name: Cuatro Smash
title: Cuatro Smash Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Cuatro Smash | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing highball-style rum cocktail with elderflower, ruby red grapefruit, and tonic.
marketing_description: Enjoy this Caribbean smash hit featuring BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur, grapefruit juice and tonic. The Cuatro Smash is highly refreshing and universally enjoyable.

steps: Combine all ingredients except the tonic water in a shaker with plenty of ice, and shake.
Strain into a highball glass filled with crushed or cubed ice.
Garnish with a grapefruit peel and a mint sprig.

garnish: grapefruit peel and a mint sprig
raw_text_excerpt: Enjoy this Caribbean 'smash' hit featuring BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur, grapefruit juice and tonic. How to make a Cuatro Smash 37.5 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum 25 ml ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur 25 ml ruby red grapefruit juice 25 ml tonic water 1 Build Combine all ingredients except the tonic water in a shaker with plenty of ice, and shake. 2 Strain Strain into a highball glass filled with crushed or cubed ice. 3 Top Top with tonic water. 4 Garnish Garnish with a grapefruit peel and a mint sprig.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Cuatro Smash Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
